title: Em's Vanilla Improved
description: Em's Vanilla Improved is a Vanilla+ modpack that enhances the game while preserving its original feel.
body:
# Em's Vanilla Improved
## A Vanilla+ Modpack by EBM3199
Hello! This is my very first publically released Minecraft Modpack!

If you are like me, you've probably installed a modpack, play for an hour or two and get completely burnt out. Now im not saying that won't happen here—but this is built for players who enjoy the vanilla feel of Minecraft but have played WAY too much of it. 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JwIGFqx8IVQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 🌍 World & Gameplay Enhancements:

**Biomes O' Plenty** – Gorgeous new biomes that still feel vanilla-friendly.

**Copper Tools** – Seriously, why aren’t these in vanilla already?

**Set your home!** - /sethome, /home commands.

**Xaero's Minimap** – Never get lost again, unless you want to.

**_MaCaw’s_ and Tomalbrc's Furniture mods**– Add flair to your builds!

**Better Animations & Sounds** - Includes better camera mods, and other sound effect mods.

**Tom's Simple Storage** – A storage mods to keep your stuff organized.

**Performance Mods** - Sodium and other performance mods.

**Custom Resource Packs** - Custom Resource packs created by me!

**Killer shaders for both performance & cinematics!**

## 80+ other mods and counting!


Another huge thing in this pack is that Essential is built it in. Essential is a simple and easy to use multiplayer mod where you don't have to rent or use a server, just invite your friends and play!

Controller support is also built in for those weird people.

**If you have any questions or concerns, feel free to reach out on the Discord server linked here. For bugs or issues, please fill out the Google Form.**
